headline: Atmus Filtration Technologies Set to Join S&P SmallCap 600
summary: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc. (NYSE: ATMU) will replace Air Lease Corp. (NYSE: AL) in the S&P SmallCap 600 effective prior to the opening of trading on Thursday, April 9. Sumitomo Corporation & Consortium are acquiring Air Lease Corp in a deal expected to be completed soon, pending final closing conditions.

headline: Two solid ‘yes’ votes for Echo Global’s acquisition: Moody’s and S&P
summary: Two debt ratings agencies have given a vote of confidence in Echo Global Logistics’ recent acquisition of ITS Logistics. Neither Moody’s nor S&P Global Ratings changed their debt rating on Echo Global, which is privately-owned but does have publicly-traded debt. But the outlook on Echo Global from both companies was increased to positive from stable, […] The post Two solid ‘yes’ votes for Echo Global’s acquisition: Moody’s and S&P appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Asia-Pacific markets mostly rise in Easter trade on hopes for Hormuz reopening
summary: South Korea's Kospi led gains in the region while Japan's Nikkei 225 also opened higher. The Australian and Hong Kong markets were closed for the Easter weekend.

headline: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Are Having Their Best Week of the Year Despite Today's Slide
summary: The S&P 500 is up 2.4% this week, its best weekly gain since Nov. 28, according to Dow Jones Market Data.  The Nasdaq is up 3%, which would be its best week since Nov. 28, too.  The Dow is up 975 points, or 2.2%, on the week, which would mark its best week since Feb. 6.
